rect.style: stroke: url("#color-3"); paint-order: fill; stroke-width: 0; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: 1, 4; filter: url("#inner-shadow-filter-0") url("#inner-shadow-filter-1") url("#drop-shadow-filter-0"); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(236, 233, 230); fill-opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; visibility: hidden;

stroke: url("#color-3"); paint-order: fill; stroke-opacity: 0.52; stroke-width: 0; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: 1, 4; fill: url("#gradient-0"); filter: url("#inner-shadow-filter-0") url("#inner-shadow-filter-1") url("#drop-shadow-filter-0"); pointer-events: none; visibility: hidden;

stroke: url("#color-3"); paint-order: fill; stroke-width: 0; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-dasharray: 1, 4; filter: url("#inner-shadow-filter-0") url("#inner-shadow-filter-1") url("#drop-shadow-filter-0"); stroke-opacity: 0; fill: rgb(236, 233, 230); fill-opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;

text.style: white-space: pre; fill: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 28px; filter: url("#pixelete-filter-0");
